data.title: Circle's after-hours price was $87.71, with a daily trading volume of over $47 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to data from Yahoo Finance, Circle's stock price rose 168.48% on its first day of listing, closing at $83.23 and its after-hours price at $87.71. The trading volume on the day reached $47.109 million.

data.title: Arthur Hayes: Circle's listing led to a crypto IPO boom that ended with an EOS-like event
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes posted on the X platform, "What a glorious day today is. Has the ICO spirit of 2017 transformed into the IPO boom of 2025-2027? This is just the beginning of the frenzy. In the end, it will end with a sensational IPO similar to EOS, sucking away huge amounts of fiat capital and plummeting after the opening."

data.title: The number of CME Bitcoin futures major traders increased by 36% from the beginning of the year, reaching a record high
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The number of CME Bitcoin futures majors has reached a record high of 217, an increase of 36% from the beginning of the year, indicating that institutional investors' interest in Bitcoin has increased significantly. Since the beginning of 2024, the number of large traders has continued to rise steadily, indicating that institutional allocation of Bitcoin has become a consistent trend rather than an opportunistic transaction. (The Block)

data.title: BlackRock buys $357 mln in BTC, ETH amid shifting whale sentiment
data.description:
BlackRock purchases $357M in crypto as Ethereum whales accumulate and Bitcoin whales shift to profit-taking.

data.title: $41,000 Drained From Woman’s PNC Bank Account – And Her Daughter Is Now a Suspect: Report
data.description:
A woman in Pennsylvania is accused of abusing family ties to steal large sums of cash from her mother’s PNC bank account for personal use. Grove City Police just arrested 55-year-old Lynn Dewey following a bank fraud investigation, reports 21 WFMJ.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/06/05/41000-abruptly-drained-from-elderly-disabled-womans-pnc-bank-account-turns-out-daughter-now-a-suspect-report/

data.title: What Happens To The XRP Price If The 2017 Fractal Plays Out Again?
data.description:
XRP’s price action is currently exhibiting a back-and-forth pattern around $2. 20, but an interesting technical analysis suggests it may soon leave this price level. A chart analysis posted by a crypto analyst on the social media platform X has given an interesting projection about XRP’s next move. By overlaying XRP’s current weekly chart with its explosive 2017 fractal, the analyst hints that the altcoin might be on the verge of a repeat performance that sends it far beyond its current price range
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/xrp-2017-fractal-reappearing/

data.title: Crypto Is ‘The Future,’ House Financial Services Oversight Subcommittee Chair Says
data.description:
Congressman Bill Huizenga (R-MI) said digital assets are “the future” while discussing potential crypto policy during a key House Financial Services Committee hearing on Wednesday.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/crypto-is-the-future-house-financial-services-oversight-subcommittee-chair-says/

data.title: 'A Different Era': Bored Ape Creator Yuga Labs Wants to Kill the ApeCoin DAO
data.description:

data.title: Circle's Stock Surges on First Day of Trading
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Circle experienced a significant increase on its first day of trading, with shares rising by 168.48%. The stock closed at $83.23, and the trading volume for the day reached $47.109 million.

data.title: South Korean Parliament ‘Poised to Approve Tokenized Securities Bill’
data.description:
The South Korean parliament could soon approve a draft tokenized securities bill, finally giving domestic firms the right to launch blockchain technology-powered coins tied to real estate, raw materials, livestock, and copyrighted works.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/south-korean-parliament-poised-to-approve-tokenized-securities-bill/

data.title: Dogecoin crashes by 10% as Elon Musk breaks ties with Trump administration
data.description:
Dogecoin tanked 10% today, with its weeklong losses now sitting at 22%, after Elon Musk officially walked away from Donald Trump’s administration and cut ties with the Department of Government Efficiency, known by its ironic acronym, DOGE. The crash unfolded alongside a brutal political brawl between Elon and the sitting US president, and it dragged […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/dogecoin-crashes-elon-breaks-ties-with-trump/

data.title: USDC Treasury Burns 75 Million USDC on Ethereum Blockchain
data.description: According to PANews, Whale Alert has reported that the Ethereum blockchain address 0x55fe…44b8, associated with the USDC Treasury, conducted a significant transaction on June 6, 2025. At 7:03 AM UTC+8, the address destroyed 75 million USDC tokens. This event marks a notable movement in the cryptocurrency market, reflecting ongoing adjustments in digital asset management.
